title: bidens martii
intro: Bidens martii, also known as Spanish needles, is a perennial herb native to the Americas, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Bidens martii has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular remedy for conditions like arthritis and wounds. The herbal preparations of Bidens martii include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used externally to treat skin conditions and internally to support overall health.
